verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He's done it all, He made a way So that we can taste the greatest victory One day we'll trade our battle scars For our precious crowns Because He kept our victory

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There's nothing we can ever do All that we need is trust and pray His grace will surely bring us through To our perfect day

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I know that I will make it through He's more than able to fulfill it Believe His Word and follow Him I'll keep the victory
